title: State of the Finnish News Media 2008
description: In the study, the news output of nineteen Finnish media (newspapers, TV, and radio) during 14 days between October 2007 and March 2008 was analysed. In total, the research material consists of 3,008 news stories or groups of stories. The status, nature and topic of the news story were coded and categorized from the material.
